title: AXMapLocation
description: Represents a location on the map with additional precision information, extending AXMapMarker.

props.name: latitude
props.description: The latitude coordinate of the location.

props.name: longitude
props.description: The longitude coordinate of the location.

props.name: popupOpen
props.description: Whether the popup should be open by default.

props.name: popupCloseButton
props.description: Whether the popup should have a close button.

props.name: isLocked
props.description: If true, the location cannot be deleted or moved/edited via draw interactions.

props.name: id
props.description: Optional unique identifier for id-based operations.

props.name: precision
props.description: The precision of the location coordinates in meters.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: TypeScript interface definition for map locations with precision.
